title: minifier family
manager: A family of source minifiers for FSL — strip comments, collapse whitespace, shorten lists, compress color notation — so a machine can ride in a URL or a tight bundle without its readable-but-verbose source. The viewer permalinks use this, and each minification is stochastically verified to preserve meaning, so shrinking a machine can never silently change what it does — the reason a minifier for a semantic language has to be more careful than one for text.
cs: minifier family (comments/whitespace/lists/atoms/colors, fsl#190/#199 cluster); stoch-verified meaning-preservation; powers viewer-URL encoding; each transform reversible-in-meaning.
